nodes.name: Merge: payload + client_id + zone + build SQL

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, application_code: $json.application_code, application_id: $json.application_id, zone_status: $json.zone_status, status: 'submitted', received_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation lgaDraftCreate($input: DraftOrderInput!) { draftOrderCreate(input: $input) { draftOrder { id name invoiceUrl status } userErrors { field message } } }', variables: $json.variant_id ? { input: { lineItems: [{ variantId: 'gid://shopify/ProductVariant/' + String($json.variant_id).replace(/\D/g,''), quantity: $json.quantity || 1 }], email: $json.email || null, phone: $json.phone || null, shippingAddress: { firstName: $json.first_name || '—', lastName: $json.last_name || '—', address1: $json.address_line || '', city: $json.locality || '', province: $json.province || '', zip: $json.postal_code || '', country: 'Argentina', phone: $json.phone || '' }, billingAddress: { firstName: $json.first_name || '—', lastName: $json.last_name || '—', address1: $json.address_line || '', city: $json.locality || '', province: $json.province || '', zip: $json.postal_code || '', country: 'Argentina', phone: $json.phone || '' }, tags: ['lga-credit','lga-pending-approval','lga-app-' + $json.application_code], note: 'Crédito LGA pendiente de aprobación.\nDNI ' + $json.dni + ' · Monto pedido $' + Math.round($json.requested_amount_ars).toLocaleString('es-AR') + ' ARS · ' + $json.requested_installments + ' cuotas ' + $json.payment_frequency + '.\nApplication code: ' + $json.application_code, customAttributes: [{ key: 'lga_application_code', value: $json.application_code }, { key: 'lga_dni', value: $json.dni }, { key: 'lga_monto_pedido_ars', value: String(Math.round($json.requested_amount_ars)) }, { key: 'lga_cuotas', value: String($json.requested_installments) }, { key: 'lga_payment_frequency', value: $json.payment_frequency }] } } : { input: {} } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation lgaDraftComplete($id: ID!, $paymentPending: Boolean) { draftOrderComplete(id: $id, paymentPending: $paymentPending) { draftOrder { id order { id name displayFulfillmentStatus displayFinancialStatus } } userErrors { field message } } }', variables: { id: $json.shopify_draft_order_gid, paymentPending: true } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $json;
const hasShopify = !!(p.shopify_draft_order_id || p.shopify_order_id);
return [{ json: {
  title: p.application_code || ('LGA-' + Date.now()),
  status: 'publish',
  acf: {
    first_name: p.first_name || '', last_name: p.last_name || '',
    dni: p.dni || '', birth_date: p.birth_date || '',
    phone: p.phone || '', email: p.email || '',
    address_line: p.address_line || '', locality: p.locality || '',
    province: p.province || '', postal_code: p.postal_code || '',
    housing_status: p.housing_status || '', occupation: p.occupation || '',
    occupation_detail: p.occupation_detail || '',
    declared_income_ars: p.declared_income_ars || 0,
    guarantor_name: p.guarantor_name || '', guarantor_phone: p.guarantor_phone || '',
    guarantor_relation: p.guarantor_relation || '',
    requested_amount_ars: p.requested_amount_ars || 0,
    payment_frequency: p.payment_frequency || '',
    requested_installments: p.requested_installments || 0,
    estimated_installment_ars: p.estimated_installment_ars || 0,
    application_status: 'submitted', zone_status: p.zone_status || '',
    shop: p.shop || '', source: p.source || '',
    product_id: String(p.product_id || ''), variant_id: String(p.variant_id || ''),
    product_title: p.product_title || '', product_handle: p.product_handle || '',
    unit_price_ars: p.unit_price_ars || 0, quantity: p.quantity || 1,
    cart_token: p.cart_token || '', cart_total_ars: p.cart_total_ars || 0,
    cart_summary: p.cart_summary || '',
    utm_source: p.utm_source || '', utm_medium: p.utm_medium || '',
    utm_campaign: p.utm_campaign || '', utm_content: p.utm_content || '',
    utm_term: p.utm_term || '', referrer_url: p.referrer_url || '',
    landing_url: p.landing_url || '',
    application_code: p.application_code || '',
    application_id: p.application_id || '', client_id: p.client_id || '',
    supabase_synced_at: new Date().toISOString().replace('T',' ').slice(0,19),
    // Shopify: draft + order (porque ahora completamos el draft al instante)
    shopify_draft_order_id:   p.shopify_draft_order_id || '',
    shopify_draft_order_gid:  p.shopify_draft_order_gid || '',
    shopify_draft_order_name: p.shopify_draft_order_name || '',
    shopify_invoice_url:      p.shopify_invoice_url || '',
    shopify_order_id:         p.shopify_order_id || '',
    shopify_order_gid:        p.shopify_order_gid || '',
    shopify_order_name:       p.shopify_order_name || '',
    shopify_order_fulfillment_status: p.shopify_order_fulfillment_status || '',
    shopify_order_financial_status:   p.shopify_order_financial_status || '',
    shopify_status:           p.shopify_status || '',
    shopify_last_error:       p.shopify_last_error || '',
    shopify_last_sync_at:     hasShopify ? new Date().toISOString().replace('T',' ').slice(0,19) : '',
  }
}}];

main.node: Merge: payload + client_id + zone + build SQL
